input_text: Kita kena bunuh semua anjing liar kat kawasan masjid ni. Tembak pakai senapang angin. Siapa ada senapang?
reason: Calling for mass killing of stray dogs near a mosque using air rifles, animal cruelty combined with religious justification.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah anjing liar boleh dilaporkan kepada jabatan veterinar atau SPCA untuk pengurusan yang berperikemanusiaan.

input_text: Those Malay politicians are all corrupt thieves. We should drag them out of Parliament and hang them in Dataran Merdeka!
reason: Calling for extrajudicial execution of politicians by public hanging with ethnic framing, seditious violence incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Corruption should be fought through proper channels: MACC reports, free press investigations, and voting for accountability. Violence is never the answer.

input_text: Sesiapa nampak perempuan muda yang jalan sorang-sorang malam ni kat kawasan kita, tangkap dan soal siapa dia. Biar diorang takut keluar malam!
reason: Organizing vigilante patrols to detain and interrogate women walking alone at night, constituting kidnapping and gender-based intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kawasan adalah tanggungjawab polis dan Rukun Tetangga. Menahan orang tanpa kuasa undang-undang adalah jenayah.

input_text: 那些在中国新年卖猪肉的马来小贩都是假穆斯林！我们要把他们的摊位砸烂！
reason: Inciting destruction of food stalls based on religious purity accusations, combining takfiri ideology with property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: 食品销售由相关部门监管。如果有宗教合规方面的疑虑，可以向JAKIM报告，而不是自行采取暴力行动。

input_text: இந்த ஊரில் உள்ள சீன உணவகங்களில் நாய் இறைச்சி பரிமாறுகிறார்கள்! எல்லோரும் பகிருங்கள்! அந்த கடைகளை மூடுவோம்!
reason: Fabricating claims about Chinese restaurants serving dog meat to incite mass boycott and forced closures.
suggested_rewrite: உணவக சுகாதார கவலைகள் இருந்தால், சுகாதார அமைச்சகத்திடம் புகார் செய்யலாம். ஆதாரமில்லாத குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை பரப்ப வேண்டாம்.

input_text: Aku nak pasang CCTV rahsia kat bilik tukar baju gym untuk record awek-awek Cina. Jual kat dark web boleh untung besar!
reason: Planning hidden camera voyeurism in changing rooms targeting Chinese women for commercial exploitation, constituting sexual crime.
suggested_rewrite: Memasang kamera tersembunyi di bilik tukar baju adalah jenayah seksual yang serius. Menjual rakaman sebegini di dark web menambah lagi kesalahan jenayah.

input_text: If I see one more Myanmar refugee in my neighborhood, I'm going to set their house on fire. I've already bought lighter fluid.
reason: Threatening premeditated arson against refugees with materials already purchased, direct violence threat with preparation.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about refugees in your area should be directed to UNHCR or immigration authorities. Arson is a serious crime that endangers lives.

input_text: Kita perlu buat kumpulan rahsia untuk ugut semua peniaga bukan Melayu supaya bayar 'cukai perlindungan' setiap bulan. Kalau tak bayar, pecah kedai!
reason: Organizing ethnic protection racket/extortion ring against non-Malay businesses, constituting organized crime.
suggested_rewrite: Memeras ugut peniaga adalah jenayah terancang yang serius. Perniagaan dilindungi undang-undang tanpa mengira kaum pemilik.

input_text: 我发现了那个在网上骂中国人的马来人的工作地点。我们明天去他公司闹，让他被开除！如果公司不开除他，我们就砸公司！
reason: Doxxing someone's workplace and planning harassment campaign with property destruction threats, organized intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: 网络上的种族言论可以向MCMC或警方举报。到他人工作地点闹事和威胁破坏是违法行为。

input_text: Semua orang perlu tahu - doktor Cina kat klinik swasta sengaja bagi ubat mahal yang tak perlu supaya orang Melayu bankrap!
reason: Fabricating medical conspiracy that Chinese doctors deliberately overcharge Malay patients to bankrupt them, dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Doktor di Malaysia tertakluk kepada etika perubatan yang ketat. Jika rasa dibebani caj berlebihan, dapatkan pendapat kedua atau failkan aduan kepada Majlis Perubatan.

input_text: Let's plant drugs in that Indian politician's car and tip off the police. That'll end his career and send a message to his community!
reason: Planning evidence fabrication to frame a politician for drug possession, weaponizing law enforcement against an ethnic community.
suggested_rewrite: Planting evidence is a serious criminal offense. Political opposition should be expressed through democratic means, not illegal frame-ups.

input_text: Aku ada sniper scope untuk senapang aku. Nak try aim kat orang yang lalu lalang depan masjid haram tu dari tingkap rumah aku.
reason: Describing sniper-style targeting of people near a religious building, constituting terroristic threat with weapons.
suggested_rewrite: Menggunakan senjata api untuk mengancam orang awam adalah jenayah keganasan. Jika anda memiliki senjata api berlesen, ikuti semua peraturan keselamatan dan undang-undang.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் நிர்வாகியின் மகளின் படங்களை இணையத்தில் பரப்புவோம். அவள் என்ன செய்கிறாள் என்று எல்லோருக்கும் தெரிய வேண்டும்!
reason: Threatening to distribute private photos of an administrator's daughter online, constituting non-consensual image sharing targeting a minor/young woman.
suggested_rewrite: ஒருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட புகைப்படங்களை அனுமதியின்றி பரப்புவது சட்டத்தின் கீழ் குற்றமாகும். எந்த பிரச்சினையும் சரியான வழியில் தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Kita kena racun makanan kat kantin sekolah agama tu. Biar semua budak diorang masuk hospital!
reason: Planning mass poisoning of schoolchildren at a religious school canteen, constituting terrorism against minors.
suggested_rewrite: Meracun makanan kanak-kanak adalah percubaan pembunuhan besar-besaran. Jika ada masalah dengan sekolah, gunakan saluran rasmi pendidikan.

input_text: Chinese temples are a fire hazard with all those joss sticks. Let's help speed up the process - one match and the problem is solved permanently!
reason: Suggesting arson of Chinese temples disguised as fire safety concern, inciting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Fire safety concerns about any building should be reported to the fire department (Bomba). They conduct inspections and work with premises to ensure compliance.

input_text: Aku dah record semua perbualan WhatsApp group sekolah anak aku. Ada cikgu yang cakap benda rasis. Aku nak sebar kat media dan pastikan dia kena buang kerja dan keluarga dia malu!
reason: Threatening to weaponize private group chat recordings to destroy a teacher's career and shame their family, disproportionate privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika cikgu membuat kenyataan rasis, laporkan kepada pihak pentadbiran sekolah atau JPN dengan bukti yang relevan. Mereka akan ambil tindakan yang sewajarnya.

input_text: 那些住在PJ的印度人都是混混和小偷。我们要在他们的街区设路障，不让他们出入！
reason: Racial profiling all Indians in PJ as criminals and calling for ethnic barricades to restrict their movement, constituting apartheid-like discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: 所有社区的居民都有自由行动的权利。如果担心安全问题，可以加入居民协会或联系当地警方。

input_text: Lepas PRU ni, kalau parti kita kalah, kita serbu pusat mengundi dan bakar semua peti undi! Demokrasi palsu!
reason: Planning election violence - storming polling centers and burning ballot boxes, constituting sedition and election fraud.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan pilihan raya boleh dicabar melalui petisyen pilihan raya yang sah. Keganasan terhadap proses demokrasi adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Found the home address of that blogger who wrote against our race. Printing it on flyers now. Will distribute around his neighborhood so everyone knows what kind of person lives there.
reason: Mass doxxing via printed flyers distributed in a neighborhood, organizing community-wide harassment campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreements with bloggers should be addressed through counter-speech or legal channels. Distributing someone's address on flyers to incite harassment is a serious crime.

input_text: Saya cadangkan kita culik anak pegawai imigresen tu. Dia reject permit kerja kawan kita. Lepas tu minta tebusan RM100k!
reason: Planning kidnapping of a government officer's child for ransom in retaliation for permit denial, organized crime.
suggested_rewrite: Penolakan permit kerja boleh dirayu melalui saluran rasmi. Penculikan adalah jenayah paling serius yang boleh dikenakan hukuman mati.

input_text: 大家注意！附近的印度寺庙在用人骨做仪式！我亲眼看到的！赶快报警，最好自己去把庙拆了！
reason: Fabricating grotesque accusation of human bone rituals at a Hindu temple to incite vigilante destruction, blood libel-style hate.
suggested_rewrite: 对任何场所有疑虑应直接向警方报告。散布未经证实的耸人听闻指控会煽动不必要的恐惧和仇恨。

input_text: Kita kena boikot semua hospital kerajaan. Doktor bukan Islam sengaja bagi ubat salah kepada pesakit Islam supaya diorang mati!
reason: Fabricating medical murder conspiracy against non-Muslim doctors, extremely dangerous misinformation that could prevent Muslims from seeking medical care.
suggested_rewrite: Semua doktor di Malaysia terikat dengan sumpah perubatan untuk merawat semua pesakit tanpa mengira agama. Jika ada kebimbangan, failkan aduan rasmi kepada KKM.

input_text: We should electrify the fence around our taman to keep out the foreign workers. If they try to climb over and get shocked, that's their problem!
reason: Advocating booby-trapping residential fences to electrocute foreign workers, constituting attempted murder through dangerous trap.
suggested_rewrite: Security concerns in residential areas should be addressed through proper measures like CCTV and security patrols. Illegal electrified fences can kill people and result in murder charges.

input_text: Aku nak buat demonstrasi depan sekolah Cina esok. Bawa mercun besar dan let off depan pintu masuk masa budak-budak tengah masuk!
reason: Planning to detonate large firecrackers at a Chinese school entrance while children are entering, endangering children's safety.
suggested_rewrite: Membahayakan keselamatan kanak-kanak di sekolah adalah jenayah serius. Jika ada bantahan, kemukakan melalui saluran rasmi Kementerian Pendidikan.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் எந்த மலாய் குடும்பமும் வீடு வாங்க முடியாது. நாம் அனைத்து சொத்து முகவர்களையும் எச்சரிப்போம்!
reason: Organizing housing discrimination to prevent Malays from buying property in an area, constituting racial exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: வீடு வாங்கும் உரிமை இனத்தை பொருட்படுத்தாது அனைவருக்கும் உண்டு. சொத்து பரிவர்த்தனையில் இன பாகுபாடு சட்டத்திற்கு புறம்பானது.

input_text: Sebar gambar skandal ketua kampung dengan janda tu. Aku dah photoshop cantik-cantik. Biar reputasi dia hancur!
reason: Creating and distributing fabricated scandal photos to destroy someone's reputation, combining deepfake creation with defamation.
suggested_rewrite: Mencipta dan menyebarkan gambar palsu (photoshop) untuk menjatuhkan reputasi seseorang adalah fitnah dan jenayah siber yang serius.

input_text: The Orang Asli don't deserve their land. Let's forge documents showing we own it, then send thugs to evict them. They can't afford lawyers anyway!
reason: Planning land theft through document forgery and armed eviction of indigenous people, exploiting their vulnerability.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land rights are legally protected. Land fraud and forced eviction are serious crimes. JAKOA and legal aid organizations provide support for land disputes.

input_text: Kita kena serang semua kedai barber India kat town ni. Potong rambut pun tak reti, buang masa je. Bakar kedai tu!
reason: Calling for arson attacks on Indian-owned barbershops, ethnic violence disguised as service complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan perkhidmatan kedai gunting, anda bebas memilih kedai lain. Keganasan terhadap peniaga berdasarkan kaum adalah jenayah kebencian.

input_text: 今晚我们去那个马来区放鞭炮，故意吵到他们不能睡觉。连续放一个月，看他们受不受得了！
reason: Planning month-long harassment campaign using fireworks to deprive a Malay neighborhood of sleep, organized ethnic intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: 故意在住宅区制造噪音骚扰是违法行为。社区之间的矛盾应通过对话和地方当局来解决。
